speaker: szarfman
text: Note the safety signals for cardiac events with the Pfizer and Moderna vaccines, now in the news, that are better identified by RGPS than by MGPS.
context: Szarfman resent DuMouchel's analysis to Niu and other FDA officials, explicitly drawing attention to cardiac event signals coinciding with public reporting.
emphasis_words: safety signals for cardiac events with the Pfizer and Moderna vaccines, now in the news, that are better identified by RGPS than by MGPS.
